form.formComment: Last start on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a head when driven back in the field, after showing early speed, (Fr4) held up early, held up early, at Mt Gambier (2:16.50) beating Lady Suspicious in NR up to 45 on April 7 at $7 at the bell was 2nd-4.2. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Fr3) over 1780m after showing early speed at Mt Gambier was leading by 4.2 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Brown Eyed Kate (2:16.50) in NR up to 45 on April 7 at $13. Before that 8th (Fr6) over 1690m at Maryborough, beaten 30 m by Playa Del Carmen (2:07.00) in NR up to 36 on March 30 at $12. Cannot enthuse on what we have seen of late.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Ballarat on March 19. Two runs back 6th (Sr1) over 2150m at Wedderburn, well beaten by Muscle Valley (2:48.40) in MAIDEN on January 25 at $8. This looks far too tough.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Stawell and Ararat. Last start ran on from midfield and posted a big 3.5 m win as favourite (10m Fr1) at Stawell (2:51.00) beating Fremarks Peggy in No NR on April 3 at $2.25 at the bell was 3rd-2.6. Is the testing material.
